intentAndPurpose.intent: Helper row under an input — leading copy (e.g. char counter) + optional trailing low-attention condensed Button. Hides when both empty. Leading copy supports a live region for dynamic updates. Three sizes (s/m/l).

props.name: content
props.description: Leading copy (Body / Text-Medium). Rendered when non-empty.

props.name: end
props.description: Trailing action label — rendered as a low-attention condensed Button.

props.name: size
props.description: Maps copy to Body XS/S/M and the trailing Button to s/m/l.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disables the trailing Button and dims the copy to Text-Low.

props.name: aria-live
props.description: Live region for the leading copy (e.g. char-count updates).

props.name: endAriaLabel
props.description: Accessible name override for the trailing control.
